# scripts/shared/ — Synced from eSolia/.github

Files in this directory are **automatically synced** from the central
[eSolia/.github](https://github.com/eSolia/.github) repository by `sync.ts`.

**Do not edit files here directly** — your changes will be overwritten on the
next sync. If you need to fix a shared script, edit the source in
`eSolia/.github/scripts/` and re-run sync.

**Repo-specific scripts** belong in `scripts/` (the parent directory), not here.
